title: That Royle Girl
writer: Edwin Balmer, Paul Schofield, Randolph Bartlett
actors: Carol Dempster, W.C. Fields, James Kirkwood
plot: Joan Royle, beautiful but naive model who came from the slums, falls for Fred Ketlar, the leader of a dance band. When Fred's estranged wife Adele is murdered, Fred is arrested and convicted of the crime. Joan believes that the re...
